name: document_search
description: BM25 full-text search across all worker documents (domain_data + my_data + common shared library). Returns ranked results with relevance scores and content excerpts. Supports .md, .txt, .py, .json, .csv, .docx, .pdf, .xlsx. One entry per document — no chunking. Index is automatically rebuilt when files change (no wait needed after uploads).

query.description: Search query — keywords or a short phrase to find relevant documents

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

top_n_full_content.description: Return full chunk text for the top N results (default: 0 = excerpts only). Use 1-3 for deep reading of the best matches.

file_types.description: Optional list of file extensions to restrict search to, e.g. [".pdf", ".docx"]. Omit for all types.

rebuilt.description: True if the index was rebuilt this call due to file changes

full_content.description: Present only when top_n_full_content covers this rank
